ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/MiroFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish
Language: python
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinterV2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinterV2
Language: python
Automate the process of making money online.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MiroMindAI/MiroThinker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MiroMindAI/MiroThinker
Language: python
MiroThinker is a deep research agent optimized for complex research and prediction tasks. Our latest models, MiroThinker-1.7 and MiroThinker-H1, achieve 74.0 and 88.2 on the BrowseComp, respectively.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
Language: python
TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official
Language: python
Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: browser-use/browser-use
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use
Language: python
🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dimensionalOS/dimos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dimensionalOS/dimos
Language: python
Dimensional is the agentic operating system for physical space. Vibecode humanoids, quadrupeds, drones, and other hardware platforms in natural language and build multi-agent systems that work seamlessly with physical input (cameras, lidar, actuators).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
Language: python
利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain-ai/deepagents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain-ai/deepagents
Language: python
Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vllm-project/vllm-omni
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni
Language: python
A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: volcengine/OpenViking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking
Language: python
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
